summary: Comprehensive testing of Ottimizzatore di Taglio Avanzato (Advanced Cutting Optimizer) feature. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%) - FFD algorithm verified for optimal bin-packing, API endpoints working correctly. Frontend: All UI elements working - button visible, modal opens, summary cards, parameter controls, bar visualization, PDF download all functional.

backend_algorithm.FFD bin-packing: PASS - Correctly sorts cuts descending and places optimally
backend_algorithm.Kerf accounting: PASS - Saw blade width affects packing capacity
backend_algorithm.Custom bar length: PASS - Works with 6m, 12m, and custom lengths
backend_algorithm.Waste calculation: PASS - Accurate waste percentage and mm values
backend_algorithm.Edge cases: PASS - Empty items and zero-length items handled correctly

POST /api/distinte/{id}/ottimizza-taglio.response_structure: PASS - Returns bar_length_mm, kerf_mm, profiles[], summary{}
POST /api/distinte/{id}/ottimizza-taglio.profile_structure: PASS - Each profile has bars_needed, bars[], waste_percent
POST /api/distinte/{id}/ottimizza-taglio.bar_structure: PASS - Each bar has cuts[], used_mm, waste_mm, fill_percent

frontend.Ottimizza Taglio button: PASS - Visible in editor when editing distinta, data-testid='btn-ottimizza-taglio'
frontend.Optimizer modal: PASS - Opens with correct content, data-testid='optimizer-dialog'
frontend.Summary cards: PASS - Shows Barre Totali, Tagli, Utilizzato, Sfrido with correct values

Parameter inputs.bar_length_mm: PASS - Input working, updates on change
Parameter inputs.kerf_mm: PASS - Input working, updates on change
Parameter inputs.Ricalcola button: PASS - Triggers API call with new params

frontend.Profile sections: PASS - Collapsible headers with badges showing bars/cuts/waste
frontend.Bar visualization: PASS - Graphical bars with colored cuts and waste indicators

critical_code_review_comments: FFD algorithm implementation in optimizer.py is clean and efficient
PDF generation with ReportLab includes visual bar drawings - nice touch
All UI components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
React state management for optimizer params is correct with controlled inputs
test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB (test-optimizer-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test distinta with 2 profiles created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ottimizzatore di Taglio Avanzato feature fully tested. Key flows: 1) From distinta editor click 'Ottimizza Taglio' button, 2) Modal shows summary cards and per-profile collapsible sections, 3) Each profile section shows graphical bar visualization with cuts, 4) Parameters (bar_length_mm, kerf_mm) can be changed and recalculated, 5) 'Scarica PDF Taglio' downloads optimized cutting plan PDF. Backend optimizer uses FFD (First Fit Decreasing) algorithm to minimize waste.
